answers.deployedCommitMessage: checkpoint: validation lab before hybrid h monetary binding
answers.structuredFieldsNote: Deployed code (214e864) has no gross_unit_price/discount_pct/line_total_net in Pass C prompt or normalizeItems. Even after Phase 1+2 deploy, index.ts returns reconciled items with legacy keys only (unit_price, total) — structured fields are internal to Pass C, not exposed in HTTP response unless index.ts is extended.

localWorkingTree.phase2Change: Pass C schema + prompt: gross_unit_price, discount_pct, line_total_net; normalizeItems derives unit_price/total

freshInvoke.pomodorNote: Single invoke lucky €25/€50 vs VL GT; prior 5-run stability (same session) showed 4/5 DESC bleed €20/€40 — not structurally resolved on deployed code

deploymentStepsRequired: 1. Commit Phase 1+2 changes: invoice-crop-geometry.ts, invoice-table-extraction.ts, invoice-image-crop.test.ts
3. Deploy to VL: supabase functions deploy extract-invoice --project-ref bjhnlrgodcqoyzddbpbd
4. Verify deploy: supabase functions list --project-ref bjhnlrgodcqoyzddbpbd (version should increment past 20)
5. Invoke Bocconcino f0aa5a08-86a3-4938-99f0-711e86073968 — 5-run Pomodor stability; expect legacy unit_price/total in response (structured fields internal unless index.ts extended)
6. Proceed to Phase 3 binder (invoice-monetary-binding.ts) — Phase 1+2 alone insufficient per design audit
nextAction: DEPLOY Phase 1+2 to VL (commit + supabase functions deploy), then run 5-run Bocconcino Pomodor stability validation; Phase 3 binder still required to close column-shift family
bocconcinoValidationReason: Phase 1+2 not deployed — Pomodor validation against actual Hybrid H code requires deploy or local OPENAI_API_KEY (unavailable in this environment)
